reviews.review_description: Game seems great but I can't adjust seated position when I start seated it puts me down in the seat so for I can't see over the steering wheel it says play standing or seated, I don't see a discord and the website doesn't mention this game so this is the only way I found to ask the question has great potential.
It was pretty good but my car was floating and the cat was so ugly other wise pretty good.🙂🙂🙂

reviews.review_title: Not bad, graphics are very poor.
reviews.review_description:
Updated.  Finally able to access the downloadable course.  Adding one more star.  Wish the grapics weren't so poor.

Got the initial coaster, graphics sucked, good concept.  "Bought" Leviathan and it never downloaded.  Can't get a refund on either now only had both less than five days and there is no way you will get more than an hour from this app. Bad taste now with this when I wanted to give it a chance.  I see I am not the only one that can't get the paid "extra" course to load.

I what my money back.  Couldn't load the track i paid for to give these guys the extra chance.

developer_response.body:
Hello, sorry that you have been having issues with the DLC download.  

After purchasing the Leviathan DLC you should again press the panel for Leviathan, it will initialise the download and show a progress bar. Once this has completed and the files have been loaded the download bar and notification will disappear and you can now click the Leviathan panel again to open this ride.  

If you are still having issues reach out to us on appsupport@figmentproductions.co.uk

reviews.review_description: This app has a novel method for the rollercoaster.  It renders a 3D model of the coaster cockpit, but everything else is a 360° video. In theory this might be cool since a pre-rendered video can be much more complex than what a standalone headset can generate.  Unfortunately, the video quality just isn't great--it appears grainy and the resolution is sub-par.  It's an interesting concept that would be more immersive if the video quality was far higher.  But it's not and the experience with this app suffers for it.  That said, there's a free coaster to try so check it out and decide for yourself.  There's currently only 1 other coaster DLC available, and it's cheap.  Heck, I might even buy it despite not being overly impressed.
Paid for the second experience tried downloading then after downloading it goes back to 0.99p so cannot watch. Have reset meta hut still not working?

developer_response.body: Once you have bought the DLC you won't be charged again for Leviathan when clicking the button. It could be that the download did not successfully complete. Please try again and if you are still having issues send us an email on: appsupport@figmentproductions.co.uk

reviews.review_description: ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️ and looking forward to new UPDATES👍🏼
